LanguageData.RaddusX.MaterialFilter.Settings.Label: Settings
LanguageData.RaddusX.MaterialFilter.Settings.Generate: This generates the filters that the mod uses e.g. 'allow plasteel', 'allow gold', etc. The mod automatically generates these on game start, new game, and save load, but you can also use this to regenerate them at any time.
LanguageData.RaddusX.MaterialFilter.Settings.ClearCac: The cache contains a list of apparel and the material it's made of (though note it doesn't add every single item in the game to the cache, only those on the current map that match a disabled filter). The mod automatically clears the cache on game start, new game, and save load, but you can also reset it here at anytime. For example: If an item isn't being moved to a stockpile, or isn't being used in a bill, and they have been setup correctly, then resetting the cache might fix the issue.
LanguageData.RaddusX.MaterialFilter.Settings.LoggingE: Whether to enable logging (for debugging purposes). Default: OFF. I strongly recommend keeping this disabled unless you've encountered a problem w/ the mod (because the mod doesn't log any information if this is disabled).
